# Pull request

Code pull requests are not accepted in this repository because the Scanlines application source code is private.

Documentation-only changes may be accepted.

## Checklist

- [ ] This is a documentation-only change.
- [ ] This does not include private implementation details.
- [ ] This does not include secrets.
- [ ] This does not include copyrighted catalog dumps.
- [ ] The motivation for the change is clear.
